w:r.w:t: This word list is organized page by page based on your seven images. To ensure there are no repetitions, words that appear in multiple images are only listed the first time they appear.
The German words and their English meanings are taken directly from your handwritten notes. The
example sentences provided below are not from your sources
and were created to help you understand the context. You may want to independently verify these examples.
Wir werden dich bei dem Projekt
(We will support you with the project.)
(She is training hard for the competition.)
(We have to hurry before shop closing time.)
(We want to set up the new office.)
(Do you have insurance for your car?)
des Regens bleiben wir zu Hause.
(Due to the rain, we are staying home.)
Der Verkehr wurde wegen der Baustelle
(Traffic was diverted due to the construction site.)
Er wollte uns seine neue Erfindung
(He wanted to show us his new invention.)wh
(We were just able to escape the danger.)
(I still have to go to the office/agency today.)
In den Bergen gibt es eine tiefe
(There is a deep cave in the mountains.)
(Who is the central figure in this story?)
(The white sheep is standing in the meadow.)
(Snow White is a famous fairy tale.)
(Sleeping Beauty slept for a hundred years.)
(We booked a tour/guidance through the museum.)
(The care of the seniors is very good.)
(He had to suffer from the heat.)
Man sollte nicht alles sofort glauben, sondern
(One shouldn't believe everything immediately but question it.)
Nach dem Regen kam die große
(After the rain came the great flood.)
Die Sonne wird sich in den Boden
(The sun will burn into the ground.)
(You have to turn the key twice.)
(The result of the election was clear.)
(The signs point the way to the station.)
after / in future / from now on
(The production of the products happens locally.)
(The new model has reached market maturity.)
Hier wird bald ein neuer Park
(A new park will develop/arise here soon.)
(They demanded the cancellation/abolition of the rules.)
Ich konnte ihn im Dunkeln kaum
(I could hardly recognize him in the dark.)
(He is working as a substitute for the teacher today.)
(Excludes words already listed above: Flut, entstehen, lenken, einbrennen, drehen, zugänglich, weisen, Marktreife)
(We still have to catch the train.)
Diese Erfahrungen werden dich für das Leben
(These experiences will shape/coin you for life.)
Bedarf an Energie ist ein Problem.
(The rising demand for energy is a problem.)
Die Luft in der Stadt ist stark
(The air in the city is heavily loaded/polluted.)
(I realized immediately that something was wrong.)
(I have nothing against it if we go later.)
Wir haben unsere Katze aus dem
(We got our cat from the animal shelter.)
Ich habe das Paket bei der Post
(I fetched/picked up the package from the post office.)
Das Kind hat den ganzen Tag
(Language promotion is very important for children.)
(Everyone should contribute something to environmental protection.)
(We want to enjoy the beautiful weather.)
(He found his key under the table.)
(There is a lively atmosphere in the city.)
(These buildings used to serve as factories.)
(The light in the hallway was still burning/on.)
Dieser Film ist bei Kindern sehr
(This movie is very popular with children.)
Er ist gerade mit seiner Arbeit
(He is busy with his work right now.)
(Do you have all the ingredients for the cake?)
(The hotel offers a free parking space.)
(We still have to set up the furniture.)
(You can put your bag in the locker.)
Der Imker kümmert sich um seine
(The beekeeper takes care of his bee colonies.)
Das Ergebnis hat ihn nicht ganz
(The result did not quite satisfy him.)
flights made to collect food / things
(The bees return from their collection flights.)
(We bought a jar of museum honey.)
(She has already gathered a lot of work experience.)
(The money is enough for one week.)
(The ticket is only valid for second class.)
Können Sie mir den Weg auf der Karte
(Can you show me the way on the map?)
Die Rechnung ist am Ende des Monats
(The bill is due at the end of the month.)
Im Urlaub trage ich am liebsten
(On vacation, I like wearing sandals best.)
(We are waiting for you in the reception area.)
(We have to climb/rise up the mountain.)
(There are many reasons for this decision.)
(We advocate/represent the interests of our customers.)
(The new software is being marketed worldwide.)
(The accessories for the camera are expensive.)
(The disturbing noise came from the street.)
(The loan period can be extended online.)
(We sell bread, cake, and the like/what not.)
